TO26 · Figure review & fact-check

Figure & value reference

The review draft leaves ____ blanks where a number depends on the similarity metric. This page fills those blanks: each figure is rendered live from our pipeline output (figure_data/out/), in study order, and the values that change between metrics are listed alongside the draft sentence they belong in.

Use the sticky switch to compare cosine (the authors' stated metric) against euclidean (our per-source-normalized addition). The active column is highlighted, and every metric-dependent figure re-renders. Figures with no reference card have no metric-varying values.
